历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 18900 → 19208 → 19780 → 20005 → 23725, showing a gradual backward trend year by year, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3720 places in the last two years; the 2025 baseline is about 23725, a significant backward shift of 3720 places compared to 2024, indicating a notable decline; the provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 13 in 2021 → 10 in 2022 → 8 in 2023 → 11 in 2024 → 11 in 2025, and the 2026 plan is 25, an increase of 127% compared to 2025, significantly expanding enrollment and alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 125th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable ranking in the 120-130 range in recent years, belonging to the lower-middle tier of 211 universities; Douyin popularity ranking 105, rated as 'average'; Liaoning University did not appear in the 2026 reputation documents, with no major public opinion incidents; no records of enrollment gaps, overall reputation stable; the fifth round of discipline evaluation rated Applied Economics as A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, closely related to enrollment majors such as Finance and Auditing, providing some appeal for economics and management majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended; Liaoning University's enrollment in Hubei includes popular majors like Computer Science and Technology and Electrical Engineering and Automation, which strongly attract candidates; the total number of candidates in Hubei Province in 2026 is 393,700, a slight increase from 2025, slightly intensifying competition; Liaoning University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, in the Northeast region, and Hubei candidates applying across provinces have average regional preference; the university's enrollment in Hubei accounts for a small proportion, making it an out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant 127% enrollment expansion in 2026 easing competition, the 211 level providing a safety net, and the strong appeal of popular majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward based on the 2025 baseline of 23725; however, given that the 2025 backward shift of 3720 places has partially absorbed negative expectations, and the 211 level still attracts candidates, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 37840, with a range of 37340-38340.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 37340-38340, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, prioritize popular majors like Computer Science and Technology and Data Science and Big Data Technology; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, consider Tier 3 majors first to ensure admission.
